dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: `go test ./internal/cli/context -run TestStructureStepCoverage -v` passes because `internal/cli/context/structure_test.go:99-103` skips the step↔strategy assertion unless `FURROW_STRUCTURE_TEST_REQUIRE_STRATEGIES=1`, so the structural test does not fail fast by default as the AC requires.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: `internal/cli/context/contracts_test.go:128-175` exercises the exported builder/strategy/chain conformance helpers and sentinel errors, and `go test ./...` passes on a fresh run.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: The AC says `internal/cli/context/contracts_test.go` defines the generic conformance harness, but the exported harness lives in `internal/cli/context/contracts.go:234-456` while `contracts_test.go:124-145` only wraps it, and `structure_test.go:86-114` checks gate-file names against strategy files rather than asserting registry registration as specified.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: `git show --name-only 806e522e50d7faa4933d8c542236afe421b3d692` shows changes only to the four owned paths: `docs/architecture/context-construction-patterns.md`, `internal/cli/context/contracts.go`, `internal/cli/context/contracts_test.go`, and `internal/cli/context/structure_test.go`.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: `go test ./...` and `go vet ./...` both exit 0 in the current tree, with no compile or vet issues in the reviewed package.
